api: GitLab REST API v4 (official OpenAPI v2)
scope: Full official GitLab OpenAPI v2 inventory: 1,144 REST operations from gitlab-org/gitlab doc/api/openapi/openapi_v2.yaml. Existing streams remain covered; every other operation is blocked by default as direct_read, binary_read, sensitive_reverse_etl, admin_reverse_etl, destructive_action, or deprecated until its dedicated safe executor/write policy is implemented. The current GitLab bundle also retains the documented /users stream row for runtime parity because the official OpenAPI snapshot omits GET /users while the GitLab REST docs and existing connector expose it.
